package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_io_operations_scanner_used_for_large_token_stream: Layer: I/O operations. Flag bufio.Scanner on potentially large tokens without Buffer sizing or Reader alternatives.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule550NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario550Negative(records []Rule550NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
